context: Tests whether the agent implements server-side touchpoint collection with the correct session/cookie logic, the specified channel classification rules, anonymous ID persistence, and post-login identity stitching.

checklist.name: Server-side middleware
checklist.description: trackTouchpoint is implemented as an Express middleware (accepts req, res, next) rather than as client-side JavaScript

checklist.name: Conditional touchpoint creation
checklist.description: Touchpoint record is only created when either a UTM source is present OR the session has not been tracked yet (not on every request)

checklist.name: Session cookie maxAge
checklist.description: The session-tracking cookie (_session_tracked or equivalent) is set with maxAge of 1800 seconds (30 minutes)

checklist.name: Anonymous ID persistence
checklist.description: Anonymous visitor ID cookie is set with a 1-year maxAge (365 days / 31536000 seconds / equivalent) rather than a session-only cookie

checklist.name: paid-search classification
checklist.description: Visits with utm_medium of 'cpc' or 'paid' are classified as 'paid-search'

checklist.name: paid-social classification
checklist.description: Visits with utm_medium of 'paid-social' OR a source matching meta, facebook, instagram, or tiktok are classified as 'paid-social'

checklist.name: organic-search classification
checklist.description: Visits where the HTTP referrer matches google, bing, or yahoo (and no paid UTM medium) are classified as 'organic-search'

checklist.name: direct classification
checklist.description: Visits with no referrer or a same-domain referrer are classified as 'direct'

checklist.name: email classification
checklist.description: Visits with utm_medium of 'email' are classified as 'email'

checklist.name: Post-login identity stitching
checklist.description: Code includes a function or logic that links pre-login anonymous touchpoints to a customer ID after the customer is identified (checkout or login event)

checklist.name: TouchpointEvent fields
checklist.description: Touchpoint records include anonymousId, channel, source, medium, campaign, landingPage, eventType, deviceType, and isNewVisitor fields

checklist.name: Classification test output
checklist.description: classification-test-output.txt exists and shows test results for at least 8 channel classification scenarios

checklist.name: Direct re-attribution logic
checklist.description: Code includes logic or comment indicating that direct sessions immediately following an ad click should be re-attributed to the originating channel rather than direct
